title: ListChanges RPC Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation plan to expose ChangeLogBackend.ListChanges via a new ConnectRPC endpoint, CLI command, and renderer.
notes: Task-checklist implementation plan, not itself a decision/requirement/spec contract; it implements a separate linked design spec. Classified as DOC (context/execution guidance) rather than SPEC since it contains no independent API/schema contract beyond restating the linked design.
